name: mazepaw
description: Root dev scripts: copaw + embed build to src/copaw/console (Vite also mirrors to console/dist for FastAPI static fallback)

scripts.setup: npx --yes concurrently@^9.1.2 -n root,console,uv -c blue,magenta,cyan "pnpm install" "pnpm -C console install" "uv sync --extra dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k --kill-signal SIGINT --kill-timeout 1500 -n agent,console -c cyan,magenta "uv run copaw app --reload --reload-exclude 'src/copaw/console/**'" "pnpm -C console run build:embed:watch"
scripts.dev:full: pnpm -C console run build:embed && concurrently -k --kill-signal SIGINT --kill-timeout 1500 -n agent,console -c cyan,magenta "uv run copaw app --reload --reload-exclude 'src/copaw/console/**'" "pnpm -C console run build:embed:watch"
